# cellGateActivation

**Instance Property**

A parameter that defines the activation function used with the cell gate of the LSTM operation.

## Declaration

```swift
var cellGateActivation: MPSGraphRNNActivation { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `MPSGraphRNNActivationTanh`.
